name: GitLab CI/CD

naming.description: Standard POSIX. CI_ prefix vars are auto-set by GitLab. Custom vars should avoid CI_ prefix.

limits.notes: Max ~200 variables per project (group + project combined). Values ≤ 10,000 chars. Variables can be scoped to environments and protected branches.

notes: GitLab supports variable types: Variable (env var) and File (creates temp file). Variables can be masked, protected, and environment-scoped. Native Vault integration available.
